display_information.name: FaultMaven
display_information.description: AI troubleshooting copilot that works a problem like a seasoned engineer — methodical, evidence-based, and sharper with every case.
display_information.long_description:
FaultMaven is an AI troubleshooting copilot that works a problem the way a seasoned engineer does — and never forgets what it learns.

Hand it an error, a log, or a config and it doesn't just answer — it runs the investigation: triages the symptom, forms hypotheses, asks for the specific evidence that will confirm or eliminate each one, and keeps going until the root cause is found and the fix is verified.

How it works a case:
• Goal-driven — every turn moves the case toward a solution, not just a reply
• Methodical — triage, hypotheses, targeted evidence requests, verified fix; no jumping to conclusions
• Evidence-based — it reads your logs, errors, and configs, draws on your runbooks and past fixes, and shows the evidence behind every step
• Self-learning — when a case is resolved, it can capture the fix as a runbook, turning the experience into knowledge the next investigation starts from

You stay in command: it suggests, you approve and execute. And it only joins where you invite it — @mention it in a channel thread, run "Ask FaultMaven" on any alert or error message, or start a direct conversation. Once it's in a thread, just reply to keep the investigation going; each problem gets its own thread, so separate investigations stay separate.

assistant_view.assistant_description: I find a problem's root cause the way a seasoned engineer would — triage, hypotheses, targeted evidence, a verified fix — grounded in your logs, errors, configs, runbooks, and past fixes. You approve and execute; you stay in control.

shortcuts.name: Ask
shortcuts.description: Open an investigation seeded with this message
